description: Frozen canonical Nile-USDT bridge deployment config. config_hash equals the LIVE deployed vault CONFIG_HASH (TTKKLyh…, reason_tag 39048, real SP1 verifier, R6 false-tolerant safe-transfer); all three stacks (vault, prover, wallet) must use these values. reason_tag is 39048 (39050 collides with SpherePaymentData's CBOR tag). Redeployed 2026-07-03 with vkey 0x00c34ae0… to realign the deployed vault with the current prover guest ELF (the previous 0x00d75299 vault was built from a non-reproducible ELF; sp1-vkey of the committed guest is 0x00c34ae0). Redeploy with contracts/tron/scripts/deploy-nile.js real-vault <asset> <vkey>.
